ddls:
CREATE TABLE "songs" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each song */,
  "id" TEXT /* Unique ID of the song */,
  "name" TEXT /* Title of the song */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the song */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Danceability of the song (0-1) */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy of the song (0-1) */,
  "key" INTEGER /* Key of the song */,
  "loudness" REAL /* Loudness of the song (dB) */,
  "mode" INTEGER /* Mode of the song (0-1) */,
  "speechiness" REAL /* Speechiness of the song (0-1) */,
  "acousticness" REAL /* Acousticness of the song (0-1) */,
  "instrumentalness" REAL /* Instrumentalness of the song (0-1) */,
  "liveness" REAL /* Liveness of the song (0-1) */,
  "valence" REAL /* Valence of the song (0-1) */,
  "tempo" REAL /* Tempo of the song (BPM) */,
  "duration_ms" INTEGER /* Duration of the song (ms) */,
  "time_signature" INTEGER /* Time signature of the song */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity of the song */,
  "explicit" INTEGER /* Indicates if the song contains explicit content */,
  "track_number" INTEGER /* Track number of the song within the album */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the artist */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the artist */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the artist's image */,
  "followers_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers the artist has */,
  "spotify_url" TEXT /* URL to the artist's Spotify page */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the album */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who released the album */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the album */,
  "label" TEXT /* Record label that released the album */,
  "total_tracks" INTEGER /* Total number of tracks in the album */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the album's cover image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "premium_user" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user has a premium subscription */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the playlist was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the playlist */,
  "public" INTEGER /* Indicates if the playlist is public or private */,
  "likes_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes the playlist has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_songs" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Date when the song was added to the playlist */,
  "play_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the song has been played in the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id", "song_id")
)
